statusLine.command: input=$(cat); five_h=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.rate_limits.five_hour.used_percentage // empty'); five_t=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.rate_limits.five_hour.resets_at // empty'); seven_d=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.rate_limits.seven_day.used_percentage // empty'); seven_t=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.rate_limits.seven_day.resets_at // empty'); format_cd() { local ts=$1; [ -z "$ts" ] && echo "" && return; local now=$(date +%s); local diff=$((ts - now)); [ $diff -lt 0 ] && echo "0m" && return; local d=$((diff / 86400)); local h=$(((diff % 86400) / 3600)); local m=$(((diff % 3600) / 60)); if [ $d -gt 0 ]; then echo "${d}d"; elif [ $h -gt 0 ]; then echo "${h}h${m}m"; else echo "${m}m"; fi; }; out=""; [ -n "$five_h" ] && out="5h: $(printf '%.0f' "$five_h")% ($(format_cd "$five_t")) "; [ -n "$seven_d" ] && out="${out}7d: $(printf '%.0f' "$seven_d")% ($(format_cd "$seven_t"))"; echo "$out"
